HGSS.704.0001:
We should both train our Pokémon some
more and have another battle!\f
So we should really exchange phone
numbers. Don’t you agree? [0200,0000]
HGSS.704.0003:
Oh, don’t you have any confidence that
you can beat me again?
HGSS.704.0004:
Hmm? Did you decide that you want
my phone number after all? [0200,0000]
HGSS.704.0005:
Huh? Is it just me, or does your voice
seem unusually loud?\r
Don’t tell me...you’re nearby?
HGSS.704.0006:
My [0100,000A,0000] is looking more and
more like me. It’s getting cuter!\f
And, you know?
Now we can KO [0100,000B,0000] easily.\f
I should challenge the Goldenrod Gym.\f
See you later!
HGSS.704.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] is looking more and
more like me. It’s getting cuter!\f
And, you know?
We just failed to beat [0100,000B,0000] by\r
a tiny margin.\f
I’m guessing my Pokémon’s levels
aren’t high enough yet...\f
See you later!
HGSS.704.0008:
You must be a lot better now, huh?\f
How about showing me your technique
in a real battle with me?\f
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.704.0009:
Where are you?
Let’s have our battle soon!\f
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.704.0010:
Hello!\f
You know, I was on the sixth floor of
the Goldenrod Department Store trying\r
out the drawing. It’s so exciting!
